reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

title: Brooks Women's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Beware of imposters
reviews.text:
My original Brooks ripped in the seam so I ordered a new pair in Amazon. When they came they did not fit like my old ones at all.
I ended up contacting BrooksRunning directly and received the pair from them. TOTALLY PERFECT!!
What a difference from the ones purchased in Amazon. Even the labeling is different. Brooks is one of the most comfortable sneakers I have ever owned. I have four pairs. I did not have any luck through Amazon.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Comfortable, good support, walked over 9 miles without blisters.  The laces were too short, but over all I highly recommend.

reviews.title: The perfect shoe for me.
reviews.text:
This is the third iteration of Brooks' Ghost running shoe that I've purchased. I have 8, 9, and now 14. These are the most comfortable shoes I own. They're supportive, have enough room in the toe box, and cushioning in the soles.
I'm glad they come in solid colors as well as multicolored. I plan to buy another pair of Ghost 14 in the solid grey option.

reviews.title: Comfy must-buy
reviews.text: These are comfortable right out of the box. They have good supportive insoles and are very cushioned while being surprisingly lightweight. I bought them for a trip to Disneyland so they will get quite a product test in and I'll update when I know more.

reviews.title: Comfort and quality
reviews.text: Brooks makes the best running shoe! So comfortable and attractive. They last forever, too!

reviews.title: Comfort, arch support and great looking!
reviews.text: My internist and her medical staff wore this fantastic sneaker at my first appointment. They were so good looking, stylish and interesting that I went searching for them when I got home!  They come lots of trendy colors and fit true to size. I bought one pair and enjoyed walking in them so much that I ordered a second pair in red! A small stylish loop on the heel allows you to easily put them on and take them off.  These sneakers are sooo comfy and have good arch support! Doc approved!

reviews.title: So comfy!
reviews.text: I love these shoes. I wear them to the gym daily. They fit tight at first but once I got them broke in they are perfect and so cute!

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: They are amazing!!! I didn’t think they would be that comfortable, price was comfortable as well!! Wish the white was all white and not with the black, Came on time as well!!

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Very comfortable fitting shoes

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Venture 5 Running Shoes
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic.
Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.
AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Arishi Trail V1 Trail Running Shoe
description: Hit the trails in comfort and style with the Fresh Foam Arishi Trail running shoes from New Balance. These comfortable running shoes are built tough with performance features designed to help keep your feet safe and supported. Toe Protect technology helps shield your feet from rocks, roots and debris as you tackle new terrain, and a durable AT Tread dual lug outsole provides versatile traction for both on- and off-road adventures. These trail shoes are crafted with textile and synthetic uppers that feature classic New Balance branding for a fresh, sporty look. No-sew upper construction adds to the sleek fit and feel that you'd expect from these lightweight running shoes. Underfoot, you’re treated to super soft comfort with Fresh Foam midsole technology that is precision-engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride. An EVA foam insert adds even more cushioned comfort to help fuel your runs. Wherever your trail takes you, arrive in comfort with these sleek, stylish and supportive running shoes.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride
GORE-TEX waterproof fabric protects feet from wind, rain and water without sacrificing breathability
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris
Upper features no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 24 Running Shoes
description: The GEL-CUMULUS 24 (Wide) shoe is a versatile everyday trainer for various runners covering different distances. From the upper to the foam underfoot, this shoe feels softer and more responsive. To improve comfort, the upper features an improved heel fit. Meanwhile, the engineered mesh improves breathability to keep your feet cool throughout your run. This smooth distance trainer is also updated with our FF BLAST cushioning. It helps create a softer landing and a more responsive toe-off.

Gender-specific 3D SPACE CONSTRUCTION feature addresses different compression rates:
Engineered mesh upper: Improves breathability.
Reflective accents: Improves visibility in low-light conditions.

reviews.text: These are great for joint and back pain. I’m on my feet all day and they’re like a firm cloud!  I tried the nimbus but they seemed too soft for hard surfaces. The were so cushiony but I could feel the hard floor in the ball of my foot so I use them for walking in nature and these for harder surfaces. Size up a half. I wear 9.5 Asics but for nimbus and cumulus I had to go to 10

FluidFit Upper - ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.

Ortholite Lasting - This lasting material features plush underfoot comfort while providing excellent moisture management and a high level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC.)

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 22 Running Shoes
description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.
features: Made in USA or Imported
Rubber sole
Flytefoam Propel Technology In The Midsole Offers Excellent Bounce And Toe-Off

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

reviews.title: Comfort and stability - my new favorite Brooks
reviews.text: I switched from Adrenalines to GTS glycerin 20 recently and couldn’t be happier. It’s cloud-like comfort and total foot stability. A win win. I can wear these all day. I hope brooks will not mess with this because it’s perfect. They ruined Adrenalines with the 22, which became uncomfortable this year.

reviews.title: Best Shoe!!!
reviews.text: These are the most comfortable shoes I have ever worn and owned. To me, the only downside is that they don’t come in other colors. They are definitely worth the price.

title: New Balance Women's W1260V5 Running Shoe
description: We stand for something bigger than sneakers. We champion those who are fearlessly driven by their passions. We elevate sport. We do right by people and the planet. Together, we drive meaningful change in communities around the world. We Got Now.
features: 50% Breathable Air Mesh, 50% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
ABZORB heel crash pad absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance
Asymmetrical heel counter
Breathable air mesh
Dual-density construction utilizes softer EVA on top for comfort and cushioning, with more dense EVA on bottom for support

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit
reviews.text: Wow! I have 2 pair of the 1260v4 that are my absolute favs.  These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit. I love the color and the attention to details.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes!
reviews.text: I loved these shoes the first moment I put them on my feet.  They are so comfortable and provide so much support.  You really get your money's worth in these shoes.  They are like walking on clouds.  I walked in a 5K recently and they were amazing and my feet felt great afterwards. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Great style!
reviews.text: Great Shoe! I have received compliments on the style!

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Love the fit and feel of these shoes. I always buy ASICS but decided to spend the extra money these after a friend recommended them. They are super light, very comfortable, and great to run in.

reviews.title: Great fit for narrow feet!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of ASICS. The narrow fit is perfect for my feet. Not keen on the color, but it was the only color available.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: I do t feel like it supports my arch enough

reviews.title: GT2000 are always the best!
reviews.text: GT2000 are always the best! I tried something new last time and came back to these! 17 years running!

reviews.title: Perfect fit for my wide foot
reviews.text: Perfect. Wide size fits my fore foot with enough room in toe box. Longer shoestrings to accommodate extra width. Good arch support. Heel not too wide or too high like many are. Best fitting shoe Ive had on my foot in a while.

reviews.title: Soooo Comfortable
reviews.text: Ultra boost never disappoint. They are so comfortable and they look great too

reviews.title: excellent product.
reviews.text: excellent product.

reviews.title: Best in Class
reviews.text:
Adidas makes AMAZING running shoes. They're light as a feather and respond to your momentum. This pair also looks very stylish. I think it's a version of the shoe that many marathoners and Olympians wear. The knit makes them very breathable and easy to clean. They're also ideal if you like to run on vacation. They're easy to pack. Overall, I highly recommend these shoes.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: Crazy expensive for Made in Vietnam, but I like them.
reviews.text:
These shoes have a weight of 12oz each. Not super heavy, but not super lightweight either. Though you can see a thick white foam on the sole. . .The thickness of the bottom of the shoe is only about an 1/8 of an inch. If you’re running on a track or treadmill, that will probably not be an issue. But if you’re running on the road, I doubt the tread is going to last too long.

Padding on the inside is super-firm. Nice arch support. Nice firm padding around the heel / ankle.

Mesh breathable upper. The upper is all one piece, and the tongue is not separate. As you can from the pictures. . . .The laces are placed through plastic “shields” on each side of the shoe.

These shoes are Made in Vietnam. They are comfortable, and there is extra “bounce”, but I can’t say that they are worth the crazy expensive price. Nonetheless, I really like them.

reviews.title: So comfortable... like walking on air!
reviews.text:
The Adidas men’s Ultraboost 21’s are amaaaazing quality sneakers. My son wanted them, and I myself was not too sure about the pink on the bottom, however my teenager doesn’t mind the color at all. He actually loves the color combination.

The fit is perfect, true to size... and they are SO comfortable... almost like walking on air! You get that little bounce when you walk, and even more when running. They are well cushioned to keep your feet happy. They are a bit pricey, but you get what you pay for and these are worth it!

reviews.title: Shoe Falling Apart
reviews.text: We had to replace the shoes when the tie broke the first time we put the shoes on. The company sent a replacement and now a month later this pair's tie broke! Do not purchase these because they are not made well!

title: ASICS Men's GlideRide 3 Running Shoes
features: 100% Synthetic
Rubber sole
3D print details: Strategically positioned throughout the upper to improve stability
Jacquard mesh upper: Creates a softer feel against the foot while improving breathability

GUIDESOLE Technology: The curved sole design and stiff forefoot of our GUIDESOLE technology reduce ankle flexion and provide a shock-absorbent landing zone to lessen fatigue of other leg muscles and increase runner efficiency.
FF BLAST cushioning: Creates a softer feeling at foostrike and a more responsive rebound
FLYTEFOAM Propel Technology: ASICS energetic foam formulation that provides supreme bounce thanks to a unique elastomer compound.

reviews.title: Significantly smaller fit than GR2
reviews.text: I don't understand how the fit can be so different between generations, but it's just too small.  The outside dimensions look the same, but what looks like happened is the new foam is encroaching on the upper and there's just not enough room for your foot in there.  Returned.  Sad, because I liked the Glideride 2 and expected a better shoe, and a similar fitting shoe.

title: ASICS Mens Gel-Venture 6 Running Shoe
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: Rubber sole
Outdoor-ready runner with mesh and brushstroke-patterned underlays
Rearfoot GEL cushioning
Removable sockliner accommodates medical orthotics
Trail-specific outsole with reversed traction lugs
AHAR outsole rubber in critical high-wear areas
